x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist HRSD can assist employees with. More published HR topics means broader AI-assisted self-service coverage for HR inquiries.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Publish HR VA topics for top HR inquiry categories via sys_cs_topic_list.do. Include topics for benefits questions, leave requests, payroll, and HR policies. Now Assist enhances VA topics with AI-powered intent matching.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c88
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[HR VA topics define the conversational use cases Now Assist HRSD can assist employees with. More published HR topics means broader AI-assisted self-service coverage for HR inquiries.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>HR Virtual Agent Topics</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){ var gr=new GlideRecord("sys_cs_topic"); gr.addEncodedQuery("active=true^published=true^topicBlockLIKEHR^ORtopicBlockLIKEHuman Resources"); gr.query(); var n=gr.getRowCount(); return{status:n>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" published active HR VA topics",finding:n<10?"Only "+n+" published HR VA topics. More active HR topics means broader Now Assist HRSD AI-assisted self-service coverage for employee HR inquiries.":""+n+" published HR VA topics -- good coverage for Now Assist HRSD conversational AI."}; })()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>HRSD</module> <number>CHK0006033</number> <order>160</order> <remediation_guidance>Publish HR VA topics for top HR inquiry categories via sys_cs_topic_list.do. Include topics for benefits questions, leave requests, payroll, and HR policies. Now Assist enhances VA topics with AI-powered intent matching.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c88</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
